expectations.text: four-sections-present: Output contains all four exec frame sections
expectations.evidence: Uses BLUF-style headers: 'What's happening', 'Root causes', 'What we can do ourselves', 'What we need from you' — not the four-part exec frame

expectations.text: attrition-risk-surfaced: Output mentions engineers considering leaving
expectations.evidence: 'Two engineers mentioned last week they're considering leaving because of the burden'

expectations.text: hiring-decision-is-the-ask: Recommendation asks specifically for EMEA hiring decision
expectations.evidence: 'A decision on EMEA senior engineer hiring to close the coverage gap'

expectations.text: no-root-cause-analysis: Output does not enumerate three root causes or list 'runbooks and'
expectations.evidence: A full root-cause table with three rows is present (noisy alerting, missing runbooks, no EMEA coverage) — operational detail retained rather than stripped

expectations.text: payments-service-risk-kept: Output mentions payments service as critical
expectations.evidence: 'One of them owns the payments service'
